response.justification: Wei Chen brings 13+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backends, with solid software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev) and exposure to distributed micro-services handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flighting, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Seniority signals (Senior/Staff titles, founder of an open-source platform) suggest capability for IC6 work, but the candidate would be stretching into a new domain rather than bringing proven platform-building credentials. Worth a screening conversation to probe systems-thinking and data aptitude.
strengths: 13+ years across multiple languages (TS, Node, D, C/C++, Java) with production scale experience
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public teaching/workshops
Distributed/high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby (millions of req/sec, low-latency services)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, or feature flagging systems
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/experimental analysis background
Limited signals of cross-team Principal/IC6-level platform leadership or org-wide influence

key_factors.factor: Strong distributed systems and multi-language engineering depth
No clear data/statistical analysis aptitude shown
